title: DateRangeField
description: Date range picker with a dual-calendar popover and preset shortcuts.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Range picker with a dual-calendar popover and medium display format by default.

presets.title: With presets
presets.desc: Enable show-presets to add quick shortcuts like today, this week or this month.

minMax.title: Min and max
minMax.desc: Restrict the selectable range using minDate and maxDate.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.desc: The field dims, blocks the popover and preserves the visible range.

props.label: Visible label above the field.
props.placeholder: Text shown when no range is selected.
props.months: Number of months visible in the popover.
props.showPresets: Shows a column with preset shortcuts (today, week, month…).
props.minDate: Minimum selectable date in the calendar.
props.maxDate: Maximum selectable date in the calendar.
props.minRange: Minimum number of days between start and end.
props.maxRange: Maximum number of days between start and end.
props.clearable: Shows a button to clear the range.

emits.clear: Emitted when the range is cleared.
